final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input en,
    input up_down,
    output reg [2:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (en) begin
            if (up_down) begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end else begin
                count <= count - 1;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
